common.private_footer: Private by design. No tracking, no external assets.
language.label: Language
landing.title: Private feedback
landing.heading: Uninstall feedback without tracking.
landing.subtitle: KoalaBye helps developers collect anonymous, privacy-first feedback when users uninstall an extension or app.
landing.private.title: Private
landing.private.text: No analytics scripts, no fingerprinting, no IP storage, and no external CDNs.
landing.small.title: Lightweight
landing.small.text: A small Go service with server-rendered pages, SQLite, and Docker-friendly deployment.
landing.yours.title: Yours
landing.yours.text: MIT licensed, self-hostable, free forever, and built without billing code.

dashboard.selfhost_text: KoalaBye uses no external analytics or required third-party services.

legal.privacy.title: Privacy policy
legal.privacy.text: KoalaBye is a private, non-commercial open-source project. This notice explains what the application processes, what it deliberately avoids collecting, and which responsibilities remain with the operator of each instance.
legal.privacy.principles: KoalaBye is designed around privacy-friendly principles such as data minimization, transparency, and storage limitation. Operators are responsible for their own legal review.
legal.privacy.section.operator.title: Who operates this instance
legal.privacy.section.operator.text: The operator details and contact information configured for this instance are shown above. The official KoalaStuff contact is admin@koalastuff.net. Self-hosted operators must replace these details with their own.
legal.privacy.section.purpose.title: What KoalaBye is used for
legal.privacy.section.purpose.text: KoalaBye is used to collect anonymous, privacy-friendly feedback when users uninstall a browser extension or app.
legal.privacy.section.legal_basis.title: Purpose and legal basis
legal.privacy.section.legal_basis.text: The operator processes submitted feedback and minimized visit data to understand technical problems and improve the relevant project. Depending on the deployment and applicable law, the operator must determine and document an appropriate legal basis, commonly a legitimate interest in improving a voluntarily used service.
legal.privacy.section.account_data.title: Instance account data
legal.privacy.section.account_data.text: Visitors who leave feedback do not receive an account. Administrators and invited team members use local accounts containing a username, display name, password hash, and optionally an email address.
legal.privacy.section.feedback_data.text: Campaign owners receive submitted answers, submission timestamps, and minimized visit linkage. Free-text answers can contain information entered by the respondent.
legal.privacy.section.optional_diagnosti: Campaign owners may enable coarse referrer-domain, browser-family, operating-system-family, and allowlisted URL-context collection. Raw IP addresses and raw user agents are not stored by KoalaBye.
legal.privacy.section.url_context.title: URL context parameters
legal.privacy.section.url_context.text: When enabled, only documented allowlisted keys are stored. Campaign owners must not place names, email addresses, account identifiers, or other personal data in these parameters.
Partial-response collection is currently off. KoalaBye does not silently save text drafts; text answers are stored only on final submission.
legal.privacy.section.not_collected.text: KoalaBye does not store IP addresses, raw user agents, raw install tokens, full referrer URLs, device fingerprints, or cross-campaign visitor profiles.
legal.privacy.section.storage.title: Cookies and local storage
legal.privacy.section.storage.text: Public campaign pages do not set cookies. An explicit theme choice may be stored in localStorage. Authenticated application pages use security and language-preference cookies.
legal.privacy.section.hosting_logs.title: Hosting and server logs
legal.privacy.section.hosting_logs.text: KoalaBye does not write IP addresses to its database. Network infrastructure, a reverse proxy, or a hosting provider may still process IP addresses transiently and may keep access logs unless the operator disables or minimizes them. Those systems are controlled by the operator, not by KoalaBye.
legal.privacy.section.retention.title: Retention
legal.privacy.section.retention.text: Campaign owners can configure a retention period and manually delete old visits and submissions. Until deletion is performed, data remains in the instance database and its backups according to the operator's backup policy.
legal.privacy.section.rights.title: Your rights
legal.privacy.section.rights.text: Where data protection law applies, you may have rights of access, rectification, erasure, restriction, objection, and complaint to a supervisory authority. Contact the operator shown above. Anonymous records may be impossible to locate without a submission identifier or other matching information.
legal.privacy.section.self_hosting.title: Self-hosting note
legal.privacy.section.self_hosting.text: Each self-hosted KoalaBye operator controls its own deployment and database and must publish privacy information appropriate to that operation.
legal.privacy.section.campaign_owner.tex: Campaign owners decide the form questions and optional diagnostics. They must avoid requesting or encoding personal data that is unnecessary for the campaign.
legal.privacy.section.contact.title: Contact
legal.imprint.title: Legal notice
legal.imprint.text:
Project: KoalaBye / KoalaStuff
Responsible contact: Timo, private non-commercial open-source project
Email: admin@koalastuff.net
Source code: https://github.com/Shik3i/KoalaBye

No postal address is published on this project page. Whether a postal address or further provider information is legally required depends on the actual operator, jurisdiction, and manner in which an instance is offered. This notice does not claim a blanket exemption from statutory provider-identification duties. Self-hosted operators must review and replace this information for their own deployment.

Liability for content:
The content is prepared with care, but no guarantee is given for completeness, accuracy, or continued availability. Mandatory statutory liability remains unaffected.

Copyright and license:
Project code is available under the MIT License. Third-party components remain subject to their respective licenses.
legal.language_notice: Legal pages are currently available in English and German only. English is shown as the fallback.

campaign.disabled: This campaign was disabled by the instance administrator.
campaign.archived.read_only: Archived campaigns are historical and read-only.
campaign.error.invalid: Enter a valid name and a lowercase URL-safe slug.
campaign.error.slug: The campaign could not be saved. This slug may already be used in the organization.
campaign.error.limit: The campaign safety limit has been reached. Contact the instance administrator if you need more.

campaign.limit.usage: %d of %d campaign slots are in use. Archived and disabled campaigns still count.

campaign.access.title: Campaign access
campaign.access.implicit: Organization owners and admins always have implicit campaign owner access. Explicit roles grant access to other organization members.
campaign.access.error.member: Only existing organization members can receive campaign access.
campaign.access.error.last_owner: A campaign must retain at least one explicit owner.
campaign.preset.help: Select a preset to quickly populate your feedback form with best-practice questions. You can customize them later.
campaign.privacy.title: Privacy settings
campaign.privacy.preset_help: Balanced enables optional coarse referrer, browser, and operating-system statistics. Neither preset stores IP addresses or fingerprints people.
campaign.privacy.strict_summary: Strict privacy: optional coarse statistics are disabled.
campaign.privacy.balanced_summary: Balanced privacy: one or more optional coarse statistics are enabled.
campaign.privacy.promise_text: KoalaBye never stores IP addresses, never fingerprints visitors, never stores raw install tokens, and designs public pages to be cookie-free by default.
campaign.privacy.no_raw_token: Raw install tokens are never stored
campaign.privacy.install_token: Use an optional install token for unique counting
campaign.privacy.url_context_help: Allowed keys: app_version, extension_version, platform, source, channel, and utm_source/medium/campaign/content/term. Values are limited and validated. Do not put personal data in URLs.
campaign.privacy.notice: Show a privacy notice on the public page
campaign.privacy.notice_always: The public collection notice is always shown so visitors can see which diagnostics are enabled.
campaign.privacy.hash_locked: Install tokens are always protected with HMAC-SHA256 before storage. Raw tokens cannot be enabled.
instance.campaigns_description: Review campaign status and ownership across the instance.
instance.safety_limits_text: Adjust abuse-prevention limits for organizations and public traffic.
campaign.public_link.explanation: Both links open the same page. The stable link never changes; the readable link uses organization and campaign slugs.
campaign.public_link.requirements: The page is available while the campaign is active, enabled, and within its visit safety limit.
campaign.snippet.explanation: Use these examples in your extension background script. The optional random token remains local to the extension and is stored by KoalaBye only as an HMAC hash. It helps avoid duplicate counting; it does not identify a person.
campaign.snippet.no_token.title: Simpler example without a token
campaign.snippet.no_token.text: You can omit ?t= entirely. The public page and raw visit counting still work.
campaign.checklist.title: Campaign setup checklist
campaign.checklist.derived: This checklist is calculated from the current campaign. Copying and testing are marked ready when the required settings are in place.
public.footer: Powered by free and open-source KoalaBye.
public.heading: Optional feedback
public.intro: We'd love to know how we can improve. This form is completely optional and privacy-friendly.
public.privacy.title: Your privacy
public.privacy.text: We collect your submitted answers and basic campaign counts. We do not store your IP address, raw browser user agent, tracking cookies, raw install token, or fingerprints.
public.privacy.strict: Optional coarse technical diagnostics are disabled for this campaign.
public.privacy.balanced: This campaign also collects the optional coarse technical categories enabled by its owner, such as referrer domain, browser family, operating-system family, or allowlisted URL context. Full referrer URLs and raw user agents are never stored.
public.privacy.url_context: Allowlisted URL context can include app or extension version, platform, source, channel, and UTM campaign fields. Unknown parameters are ignored.
public.form.title: Share optional feedback
public.form.placeholder: This campaign is not collecting feedback questions yet.
public.unavailable.title: Feedback page unavailable
public.unavailable.generic: This feedback page is currently unavailable.
public.unavailable.quota: This free KoalaBye instance has reached an abuse-prevention safety limit. Please try again later.

form.description: Build the simple feedback form shown on this campaign's public page.
form.empty: This campaign does not collect feedback yet.
form.label: Label or title
form.option.label: Option label
form.option.error: Enter a unique lowercase value using letters, numbers, and hyphens.
form.error.invalid: Check the field values and try again.
form.error.save: The field could not be saved.
responses.title: Responses
responses.empty: No feedback has been submitted yet.
responses.privacy: Responses contain no stored IP address, raw user agent, or raw install token.
public.privacy.free_text: Feedback is anonymous. Please do not include personal information in free text.
public.form.optional: All questions are optional unless marked with an asterisk.
public.form.error.invalid: One of the answers is invalid. Please check the form.
public.form.error.too_long: One of the free-text answers is too long.
public.thanks.title: Thank you
public.limit.title: Feedback temporarily unavailable
public.limit.text: This free instance has reached its monthly submission safety limit. Please try again later.
analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Privacy-friendly campaign trends and response summaries.
analytics.utc_note: Days and range boundaries use UTC.
analytics.metadata.title: Optional coarse metadata
analytics.metadata.description: These summaries appear only for collection enabled in campaign privacy settings. They contain no raw user agents or full referrer URLs.
analytics.fields.title: Field summaries
analytics.fields.empty: No answerable fields or historical answers are available.
analytics.view_responses: View them in the response inbox.
export.title: Export submissions
export.warning: Exports may include free-text feedback. Do not share them publicly if people entered personal information.
retention.title: Data retention
retention.help: When enabled, data older than this period is eligible for manual hard deletion. No background job runs.
retention.invalid: Choose a valid retention period: 30, 90, 180, or 365 days.
retention.disabled: Retention is disabled. Data is kept until it is manually deleted.
retention.summary: Data older than %d days can be deleted now.
deletion.title: Danger zone
deletion.confirm_help: Permanent deletion cannot be undone. Enter the campaign slug “%s” when confirmation is requested.
deletion.confirmation_error: The campaign slug confirmation did not match.
